title: PhD Studentship in Monitoring and Increasing LLM Safety
supervisor: (to confirm — posting does not name primary supervisor; project sits within Cambridge LLM Safety group)
funding: Fully funded studentship (fees + maintenance) — home or overseas

constraints.notes: Cambridge intake is two-stage: (1) Google form with 2pp CV + 2pp research proposal, (2) University Graduate Admissions portal — full app + £20 fee + transcripts + IELTS + references.

eligibility: At least a first-class degree (UK 2:1+) in Engineering, Computer Science, or related discipline
Some experience with software development OR research on LLMs (preferred)
research_themes: Detecting deceptive model behaviour through perturbation analysis
Training for reasoning transparency using human predictors
notes: Stage 1 (Google form) is lightweight: 2pp CV + 2pp research proposal. Stage 2 (university portal) requires standard PhD admission docs. Best to file Stage 1 first to gauge interest.
